title: Automation and Integration Usage Report
excerpt: Hi, I don’t know why integration and automation usage report is moved to Admin Section. It is used to help every member of my account monitor and adjust their automations so they don’t exceed action limits. Can you bring…

posts.author: Denis_Le (Denis Le)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, I don’t know why integration and automation usage report is moved to Admin Section. It is used to help every member of my account monitor and adjust their automations so they don’t exceed action limits. Can you bring it back or is there something with similar functionality for my needs? Thanks.

posts.author: amichay (Amichay Even Chen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Denis_Le,

We have temporarily hidden the usage page from non-admin users due to privacy concerns. We are currently working on making the permission to view the usage page configurable by admins. This means that every account will be able to choose whether to show or remove it.

posts.author: amichay (Amichay Even Chen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Denis_Le we just released a new role permissions for the automation usage page, so now you can allow every user to access the page!
